description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python Docker image and runs on runners tagged docker. Define a single stage called docs. Add a pages job in the docs stage that executes the following shell commands in order: `apt-get --yes update && apt-get --yes install git`, `pip install -r requirements.txt`, `pip install -U setuptools`, `python setup.py docs`, `cp -r docs/_build/html/ .`, `mv html public`. The job publishes the `public` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. No additional services, caches, or rules are needed.
